name: Chocolate Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
8 oz packages, or 24 oz total
Preheat oven to 450 degrees
In a large mixing bowl, combine sour cream and 2 teaspoons vanilla. Beat until smooth. Add flour one tablespoon at a time, blending well. Add eggs; beat well.
In a small bowl, mix cocoa and 1/4 cup sugar. Add oil and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla to the cream cheese mixture; blend well.
Alternately spoon plain and chocolate mixtures into prepared crust, ending with dollops of chocolate on top. Gently swirl with a knife or spatula for a marbled effect.
Bake at 450 degrees for 10 minutes. Without opening the oven door, lower temperature to 250 degrees and continue cooking for 30 more minutes.
Without opening the oven door, turn off heat and let cheesecake sit in oven for 30 minutes. Remove from oven and loosen sides with a knife. Let cool and chill.
